data.body:
When I was in highschool I worked in a deli. I had to wash all the dishes before I could go home.

Then I worked in a fancy restaurant. I had to wash all the dishes before I could go home.

Now I teach cooking and make a real wage and get respect. I have to wash all the dishes before I can go home.
